skipped_per_recommendation.gambar_3_21_ui_landing: User akan ganti narasi Bab 3.3.2.2 (Perancangan UI) dengan referensi ke Bab 4.2 (screenshot aplikasi). Wireframe AI-generated dihapus.

gambar_1_1_arsitektur_pms_umum.caption: Gambar 1.1 Arsitektur Umum Property Management System — Sumber: Olahan Penulis
gambar_1_1_arsitektur_pms_umum.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 1.1 Arsitektur Umum Property Management System
gambar_1_1_arsitektur_pms_umum.design_notes: Diagram referensi industri PMS umum (front office, core, back office, distribution, external integrations) — bukan spesifik StayManager. Menggambarkan layer-layer fungsional yang lazim ada di PMS hotel mid-to-enterprise. Tujuan: memberi konteks pembaca sebelum dipersempit ke StayManager di bab berikutnya.

gambar_3_1_scrum_flow.caption: Gambar 3.1 Alur Pengembangan Sistem dengan Metodologi Scrum — Sumber: Olahan Penulis
gambar_3_1_scrum_flow.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.1 Alur Pengembangan Sistem dengan Metodologi Scrum
gambar_3_1_scrum_flow.design_notes: Generic Scrum framework: Product Backlog → Sprint Planning → Sprint Backlog → Daily Scrum + Development → Increment → Sprint Review → Retrospective. Termasuk 3 role (PO, SM, DT). Bukan spesifik proyek; mengikuti Scrum Guide 2020.

gambar_3_2_kerangka_berpikir.caption: Gambar 3.2 Kerangka Berpikir Penelitian — Sumber: Olahan Penulis
gambar_3_2_kerangka_berpikir.design_notes: Linear research framework: Identifikasi Masalah → Studi Literatur → Analisis Komparatif → Gap → Analisis Kebutuhan → Perancangan → Tech Stack → Implementasi → Testing → UAT → Evaluasi → Analisis vs Rumusan Masalah → Simpulan. Sudah memasukkan single-case study limitation di Conclusion.

gambar_3_3_flowchart_aplikasi.caption: Gambar 3.3 Flowchart Alur Aplikasi StayManager — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan struktur src/app
gambar_3_3_flowchart_aplikasi.design_notes: High-level user journey dari landing page hingga ke modul. Membedakan 3 mode akses: tamu publik (chatbot browse-only), tamu login (chatbot full booking), dan staff (dashboard + 12 modul UI). Realtime sync ditandai khusus untuk occupancy + dashboard saja.

gambar_3_4_use_case.caption: Gambar 3.4 Use Case Diagram Sistem StayManager — Sumber: Olahan Penulis
gambar_3_4_use_case.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.4 Use Case Diagram Sistem StayManager
gambar_3_4_use_case.design_notes: 6 aktor sesuai role di tabel `roles` Supabase + lib/hooks/usePermissions.ts. 25 use case dibagi per role berdasarkan akses rute aktual dan permission matrix. Use case Check-in include Lihat Kalender Occupancy karena flow check-in start dari /occupancy. Use case Chatbot Buat Reservasi include Cek Ketersediaan karena tool createBooking memerlukan roomId dari hasil cekKetersediaan.

gambar_3_5_class_diagram.caption: Gambar 3.5 Class Diagram Sistem StayManager — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/types/index.ts dan skema Supabase
gambar_3_5_class_diagram.design_notes: Generate dari TypeScript interfaces di src/types/index.ts (15 interface utama) + skema Supabase. Hanya field yang benar-benar ada di types yang ditampilkan. Method tidak ditampilkan karena project tidak menggunakan service class pattern (logic ada di route handler + client component, bukan OOP service classes). Relasi ditarik dari foreign key information_schema. Note ditambahkan untuk enum status dan task_type.

gambar_3_6_sequence_login.caption: Gambar 3.6 Sequence Diagram – Proses Login Staf — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/login/page.tsx
gambar_3_6_sequence_login.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.6 Sequence Diagram – Proses Login Staf
gambar_3_6_sequence_login.design_notes: Login flow sepenuhnya client-side via @supabase/ssr (TIDAK ada custom /api/auth route). Setelah signInWithPassword berhasil, halaman query user_roles JOIN roles untuk redirect logic: jika hanya role 'guest' → /chatbot, selain itu → /dashboard. Middleware (src/lib/supabase/middleware.ts) verify JWT pada setiap request route protected.

gambar_3_7_sequence_cek_ketersediaan.caption: Gambar 3.7 Sequence Diagram – Chatbot: Cek Ketersediaan Kamar — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/api/chat/route.ts
gambar_3_7_sequence_cek_ketersediaan.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.7 Sequence Diagram – Chatbot: Cek Ketersediaan Kamar
gambar_3_7_sequence_cek_ketersediaan.design_notes: Trace persis tool cekKetersediaan di chat route. Algoritma 2-step: (1) ambil room_id yang busy via reservations dengan kondisi overlap tanggal, (2) ambil rooms dengan status='available' yang TIDAK ada di list busy. Filter optional tipeKamar pakai ILIKE. Hasil dikemas dengan marker ROOM_CARDS_JSON untuk render <RoomCard /> di UI.

gambar_3_8_sequence_create_booking.caption: Gambar 3.8 Sequence Diagram – Chatbot: Create Booking — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/api/chat/route.ts
gambar_3_8_sequence_create_booking.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.8 Sequence Diagram – Chatbot: Create Booking
gambar_3_8_sequence_create_booking.design_notes: Tool createBooking generate booking_reference dari Date.now() (8 digit terakhir). Logic upsert guest: cek by email, insert kalau belum ada. Hitung breakfastTotal hanya kalau breakfastIncluded=true (pax × 50000 × nights). Reservasi dibuat dengan status='confirmed' tapi payment_status='pending'. Booking code TIDAK direveal di response — chatbot menahan info ini sampai confirmPayment dipanggil (business rule di system prompt).

gambar_3_9_sequence_confirm_payment.caption: Gambar 3.9 Sequence Diagram – Chatbot: Konfirmasi Pembayaran — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/api/chat/route.ts
gambar_3_9_sequence_confirm_payment.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.9 Sequence Diagram – Chatbot: Konfirmasi Pembayaran
gambar_3_9_sequence_confirm_payment.design_notes: Tool confirmPayment lookup reservasi by booking_reference. Insert ke tabel `payments` (UUID, reservation_id, amount, method, payment_date, transaction_id). Update reservations.payment_status='paid'. Setelah ini Gemini di-allow untuk reveal booking_reference ke tamu (instruksi di system prompt). Default payment method = 'Bank Transfer' kalau guest tidak menyebut metode spesifik.

gambar_3_10_arsitektur_llm.caption: Gambar 3.10 Arsitektur Integrasi LLM Chatbot dengan PMS StayManager — Sumber: Olahan Penulis
gambar_3_10_arsitektur_llm.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.10 Arsitektur Integrasi LLM Chatbot dengan PMS StayManager
gambar_3_10_arsitektur_llm.design_notes: Layered: Client (Chatbot UI + Interactive Cards) → Next.js Server (API Route + Vercel AI SDK) → Gemini API (model + function calling) → 4 Tool Definitions → Supabase DB. System prompt di-inject ke model sebagai konfigurasi. Marker JSON (ROOM_CARDS, SHOW_PAYMENT_OPTIONS, dll) di-parse di sisi client untuk render UI components.

gambar_3_11_sequence_checkin.caption: Gambar 3.11 Sequence Diagram – Proses Check-in Tamu — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/occupancy/page.tsx
gambar_3_11_sequence_checkin.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.11 Sequence Diagram – Proses Check-in Tamu
gambar_3_11_sequence_checkin.design_notes: Trace check-in flow di /occupancy. Mendukung walk-in (tanpa reservasi) dan check-in dari reservasi confirmed. Server actions di occupancy/actions.ts untuk fetch data. Setelah validasi: INSERT payments → UPDATE reservation → UPDATE room → INSERT invoice. Realtime channel emit perubahan ke dashboard + occupancy subscribers.

gambar_3_12_sequence_checkout.caption: Gambar 3.12 Sequence Diagram – Proses Check-out Tamu — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/occupancy/page.tsx
gambar_3_12_sequence_checkout.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.12 Sequence Diagram – Proses Check-out Tamu
gambar_3_12_sequence_checkout.design_notes: Trace handleCheckout di occupancy/page.tsx. Termasuk overdue handling (auto-add late fee billing item). Auto-create invoice setelah pembayaran berhasil (createCheckoutInvoice). API endpoint /api/housekeeping/checkout-cleaning ada di kode tapi belum confirmed apakah auto-triggered di flow ini — diberi note 'manual via tab Housekeeping atau background job'.

gambar_3_13_sequence_manajemen_kamar.caption: Gambar 3.13 Sequence Diagram – Manajemen Kamar — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/rooms/page.tsx
gambar_3_13_sequence_manajemen_kamar.design_notes: CRUD kamar di /rooms tab Rooms. 4 alt path: Create (dengan handling unique violation 23505), Update, Delete, dan Quick Status Update (dropdown). Status update memicu Realtime sync ke dashboard + occupancy.

gambar_3_14_sequence_housekeeping.caption: Gambar 3.14 Sequence Diagram – Manajemen Tugas Housekeeping — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/rooms/page.tsx
gambar_3_14_sequence_housekeeping.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.14 Sequence Diagram – Manajemen Tugas Housekeeping
gambar_3_14_sequence_housekeeping.design_notes: Tab Housekeeping di /rooms (BUKAN halaman terpisah). 3 source pembuatan task: manual oleh supervisor, otomatis post-checkout (via /api/housekeeping/checkout-cleaning), dan otomatis daily (via /api/housekeeping/daily-maintenance + RPC run_daily_housekeeping_tasks). Update status manual oleh staff, jika task_type='checkout' & completed maka kamar di-set 'available'. NOTE: tidak ada Realtime subscription untuk housekeeping_tasks — refresh manual.

gambar_3_15_activity_login.caption: Gambar 3.15 Activity Diagram – Proses Login — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/login/page.tsx
gambar_3_15_activity_login.design_notes: Decision points: validasi field, response Supabase Auth, role check (guest-only vs staff). Default fallback ke /chatbot untuk userRoles kosong (treated as guest). Middleware verify JWT setelah redirect.

gambar_3_16_activity_registrasi.caption: Gambar 3.16 Activity Diagram – Proses Registrasi Akun Staff — Sumber: Olahan Penulis
gambar_3_16_activity_registrasi.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.16 Activity Diagram – Proses Registrasi Akun Staff
gambar_3_16_activity_registrasi.design_notes: Dua mode: self-signup (untuk tamu eksternal via /signup, default role='guest') dan admin-invite (untuk staf via /staff, oleh super_admin/manager). Admin-invite: createUser via Admin SDK + temp password + lookup roles + insert user_roles.

gambar_3_17_activity_reservasi_chatbot.caption: Gambar 3.17 Activity Diagram – Proses Reservasi via Chatbot — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/api/chat/route.ts
gambar_3_17_activity_reservasi_chatbot.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.17 Activity Diagram – Proses Reservasi via Chatbot
gambar_3_17_activity_reservasi_chatbot.design_notes: End-to-end conversational flow: intent detection → login check → guest info collection → date selection → cekKetersediaan → ROOM_CARDS → user pick → confirmation → createBooking → payment options (Pay Now / Pay Later). Pay Later cabang menahan booking code, mengarahkan ke front office. Pay Now → confirmPayment → reveal booking code.

gambar_3_18_activity_checkin.caption: Gambar 3.18 Activity Diagram – Proses Check-in Tamu — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan src/app/occupancy/page.tsx
gambar_3_18_activity_checkin.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.18 Activity Diagram – Proses Check-in Tamu
gambar_3_18_activity_checkin.design_notes: Decision: walk-in vs reservasi existing. Cash payment branch include input cash received + change calculation. Sequence akhir: INSERT payments → UPDATE reservations → UPDATE rooms → INSERT invoice → success modal dengan print option. Realtime sync di akhir.

gambar_3_19_activity_housekeeping.caption: Gambar 3.19 Activity Diagram – Pengelolaan Tugas Housekeeping — Sumber: Olahan Penulis
gambar_3_19_activity_housekeeping.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.19 Activity Diagram – Pengelolaan Tugas Housekeeping
gambar_3_19_activity_housekeeping.design_notes: 3 source pembuatan task (manual, post-checkout, daily cron). Staff workflow: pilih task → start (status=in-progress) → kerjakan → complete. Branch: jika task_type='checkout' dan completed maka UPDATE rooms status='available' (kamar siap dijual kembali). Realtime sync ke occupancy + dashboard di akhir.

gambar_3_20_activity_keuangan.caption: Gambar 3.20 Activity Diagram – Pencatatan Transaksi Keuangan — Sumber: Olahan Penulis
gambar_3_20_activity_keuangan.replaces_in_doc: Gambar 3.20 Activity Diagram – Pencatatan Transaksi Keuangan
gambar_3_20_activity_keuangan.design_notes: Hub-and-spoke: 3 modul keuangan (financial KPI, expenses, billing). Validation amount > 0. Calculation logic: invoice total = subtotal + tax + service - discount. Mark Paid memicu insert payments + update billing_items. Reports modul aggregate via /api/reports/analytics + export via /api/reports/export atau window.print.

gambar_3_26_erd.caption: Gambar 3.26 Entity Relationship Diagram (ERD) StayManager — Sumber: Olahan Penulis berdasarkan skema Supabase production
gambar_3_26_erd.design_notes: ERD generate langsung dari information_schema Supabase (project ncjneagfadrmivgicszm). 22 entitas inti dengan 16 FK relationship aktual. Cardinality dibaca dari nullable+unique constraint. Tabel legacy (Chat capital C, ai_messages standalone) di-include untuk completeness. Tabel non-relasi (hotel_settings, service_items, room_service_requests, users) tidak ditampilkan di ERD ini untuk keterbacaan — disebut di narasi Bab 3.6.1.

delivery_to_word_agent.instructions: User upload PNG ke conversation Word agent satu per satu (atau batch via shared file). Word agent replace inline picture per anchor 'Gambar X.Y', pertahankan caption + sizing. Caption per gambar tersedia di field 'caption' manifest ini.
verification_required: Cross-check setiap diagram dibuka manual oleh user — pastikan layout terbaca, tidak terpotong, dan label tidak tumpang tindih
Untuk ERD, jika terlalu padat, user bisa minta saya split jadi 2-3 ERD per domain (room/reservation/billing/inventory/RBAC/AI)
Untuk Use Case, jika terlalu lebar, user bisa minta saya split per role
